arts.ttl: Tottenham star Richarlison sends X-rated rant at EA over FC 25 card
arts.sum: The ratings for each of the 17,737 players included in the Ultimate Team game mode were confirmed last week, with Richarlison actually getting an increase in last year’s rating. In the new FC 25 game he is the 10th highest ranked Spurs player.

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min delivers amazing Mikey Moore verdict and how Dejan Kulusevski has shocked him
arts.sum: "Everybody is so welcoming and looking after him, so do I, because he's such a lovely kid and working hard every single day, coming with the first team with that age it's not easy, you know, like sometimes you're very shy. "Now I want to be that guy as well, you know, just having him around me and just talking about things, because we are playing in a similar position that if I can help him a little bit with advice, then I'm always open to it.

arts.ttl: Spurs' best and worst Carabao Cup round four draw scenarios with Arsenal repeat
arts.sum: Preston North End, Sheffield Wednesday and Stoke City will be representing the Championship in the draw, with League Two outfit AFC Wimbledon taking their place in the hat only as a result of the postponement of their home clash against Newcastle United due to flooding around the Cherry Red Records Stadium. Potential Carabao Cup round four opponents: AFC Wimbledon or Newcastle, Arsenal or Bolton, Aston Villa, Brentford, Brighton & Hove Albion, Chelsea, Crystal Palace, Leicester City, Liverpool or West Ham, Manchester City, Manchester United, Preston North End, Sheffield Wednesday, Southampton, Stoke City.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou and Son press conference LIVE - Spurs boss on Moore and injuries
arts.sum: Everybody is so welcoming and looking after him, so do I, because he's such a lovely kid and working hard every single day, coming with the first team with that age it's not easy, you know, like sometimes you're very shy. When you see the young players are working hard in the first team and you just want to help, you just want to help him.

arts.ttl: Tottenham could consider a sensational swap deal involving incredible World Cup winner for their first-team star
arts.sum: Serie A club Inter Milan is reportedly keen on signing Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario and may offer World Cup winner Benjamin Pavard as part of a deal. According to a report from Inter Live, Inter’s sporting director Giuseppe Marotta views Vicario as a long-term solution for their goalkeeping needs, aiming to find a successor for […] The post Tottenham could consider a sensational swap deal involving incredible World Cup winner for their first-team star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Team News: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Qarabag FK injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Qarabag FK.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on what he's doing to ensure fewer Tottenham injuries
arts.sum: I spoke about it last year that it was a real gap in our calendar and didn't help us at certain times of the year not having regular football, that challenge of playing different types of opposition and exposing our whole squad to some meaningful game-time. I think it will help us develop as a team by facing some different types of opposition, but ultimately it is about playing our football, being as aggressive as we can and hopefully overcoming the challenge Qarabag will have tomorrow.

arts.ttl: 'We're not robots:' Son Heung-min is the latest top soccer player to raise concerns over schedule
arts.sum: Tottenham forward Son Heung-min has become the latest soccer star to publicly raise concerns over the number of games players are being asked to play. Rodri has ligament damage in his right knee, City said Wednesday without giving a time frame for his potential absence.

arts.ttl: Tottenham's James Maddison buzzing over what £33m Aston Villa player has done
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Aston Villa are both in the fourth round of the League Cup after overcoming lower-league opposition in the third round. Spurs rode...

Ange was asked if we could go back to the time in football where you don't need to have the ball to compete at the very highest level... Ange was asked how much he's looking forward to being back in European competition...
